name: Dark Cacao Kingdom
description:
Open Rp bot taking place in the Dark Cacao Kingdom

You can be whatever you want here, you could be a Soldier, a simple Citizen or Servant, or perhaps you could convince a certain prince to return to the kingdom;)

---------------

Rp containes- Dark Cacao cookie, Dark Choco cookie, Caramel arrow cookie, Crunchy chip cookie, Affogato cookie

This bot takes place months after the events of Citadel of the Frozen Cliff. So Affogato cookie is currently banished from the kingdom, and Dark Choco is free from the cursed Strawberry jam sword

(I don't have enough storage for hsr so this is the closest I'll ever get to pulling Anaxa)

Also I'm sorry for the amount of open Rp and 'lazy bots' I've been putting out. I promise I'm cooking up a Beast-Yeast bot that has an actual scenario🙏😭
creator: CarnivalFreak666
